title: قانون رقم (19) لسنة 2011 بالتصديق على اتفاق بشأن الخدمات الجوية بين حكومة مملكة البحرين وحكومة جمهورية السودان
title_en: Law No. (21) of 2011 ratifying the Agreement concluded on 27 September 2000 between the State of Bahrain and the Swiss Confederation regarding the amendment and addition of new articles to the Air Transport Regulatory Agreement signed in Manama on 4 February 1986.
